title: Words That Matter
storySnippet: Princess Lira enters the Courtyard of Context, where words reveal their true meaning through the sentences they inhabit.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The teacher asked the student to ___ good sportsmanship by shaking hands after the game.
data.definition: Exemplify: to serve as a typical example of something; to illustrate by being a model.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: During the debate, Maria was able to ___ her ideas clearly and persuasively.
data.definition: Articulate: to express thoughts, ideas, or feelings clearly and effectively in words.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Getting enough sleep before the test is ___ for performing well.
data.definition: Crucial: extremely important; essential to the success of something.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The coach checked that there was ___ water for all the players during practice.
data.definition: Adequate: enough in quantity or quality to meet a need; sufficient.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The discovery of a new species of frog was a ___ event for the science community.
data.definition: Significant: important or large enough to have an effect or be noticed.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The science fair project will ___ how magnets attract certain metals.
data.definition: Demonstrate: to show clearly by giving proof or evidence; to explain by performing an example.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The teacher asked the class to ___ the poem and explain what it meant to them.
data.definition: Evaluate: to judge or assess the value, quality, or importance of something.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Historians ___ ancient artifacts to understand how people lived long ago.
data.definition: Interpret: to explain or understand the meaning of something.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: The principal worked hard to ___ a safe and welcoming environment at the school.
data.definition: Establish: to set up or create something on a firm or permanent basis.

exercises.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence.

data.sentence: Dark clouds on the horizon ___ that a storm may be approaching.
data.definition: Indicate: to point out or show; to serve as a sign or signal of something.
